# Danx UI — Danxbot Workflow

## Running Commands

Pure Node toolchain — no Docker stack. Run directly in the repo:

```bash
npm run test:run                  # Run Vitest once
npx vitest run <filter>           # Run a targeted test file/name
npm run typecheck                 # vue-tsc --noEmit
npm run lint                      # ESLint with auto-fix
npm run build                     # Vite library build + d.ts emit
```

## Editing Files

Edit files directly — the repo is mounted locally. TS/Vue changes apply via
Vite HMR (`npm run dev`).

## Testing

- 100% test coverage is required for this library.
- Use a targeted `npx vitest run <file>` while iterating; full `test:run` before commit.
- Save output: `npm run test:run > /tmp/test-output.txt 2>&1`

## Code Style

- TypeScript/Vue: ESLint + Prettier auto-format. Strict mode, no `any`.
- Follow the component architecture rules in the root `CLAUDE.md`.

## Git Workflow (Auto-Merge)

1. Create feature branch: `git checkout -b danxbot/<kebab-case-description>`
2. Stage and commit changes
3. Push: `git push -u origin danxbot/<branch-name>`
4. Merge into main: `git checkout main && git merge danxbot/<branch-name> && git push origin main`
5. Delete feature branch locally + on origin

## Publishing

`@thehammer/danx-ui` publishes via `scripts/publish.sh` (`npm run publish:patch|minor|major`).
Publishing is the operator/maintainer's call — do not auto-publish from a card unless explicitly authorized.
